paragraphs: Nhyehy…õe ahorow a w…îde adi dwuma w…î IATF so no y…õ nea w…îtaa y…õ w…î baguam.
publicDevelopment.footnote: ∆êns…õ s…õ adwuma ho nimde…õ a …õho hia no tena nnipa nkitahodi anaa nkrataa a w…în nsa ka nko mu.

paragraphs: IATF y…õ adwuma w…î baguam w…î …îkwan a w…îfa so di dwuma no so. Asr…õde a …õk…î IAT F mu w…î w…õbsaet, e-mail, Discord, GitHub, anaa akwan foforo so no betumi ab…õy…õ baguamu adesr…õde ho kyer…õwtoh…î.
Public request record nny…õ original message no. IATF no b…õtumi aka no tiawa, akyer…õkyer…õ mu, anaa ay…õ no foforo ansa na w'atumi ada no adi.
Public request records b…õtumi asie w…î IATF GitHub ahyehy…õde no mu, w…î w…õbsaet yi so, anaa ne mmienu nyinaa so.

Ansa na IATF reb…õtintim no, …îyi contact details a …õho nhia, private addresses, ne identifying details a …õfa individual users of assistive technologies ho no firi h…î, gye s…õ ne tintim no w…î botae a …õda adi pefee na …õfata.
Discord de di dwuma ma informal coordination. IATF mfa Discord nk…îmm…îb…î nto h…î, na nkrataa a w…îde sie no, Discord na …õhw…õ so.

W…îmfa ns…õm a w…îhwehw…õ no nni dwuma w…î search engine indexing mu. Public kyer…õ s…õ wobetumi ay…õ ho nhwehw…õmu na w…îadi ho dwuma. ∆ênkyer…õ s…õ w…îasiesie no yiye ama w…în a w…îb…õhu no denam din a w…îb…õhwehw…õ so.

IATF betumi asesa anaa ayi nkrataa afi baabiara a w…îhw…õ so, nanso wontumi mma kwan s…õ w…îb…õyi afiri baabi a nnipa a w…în ho nni mfaso te te te s…õ caches, notifications, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, anaa afidie foforo biara so.
S‘ë as‘ëm bi hia s‘ë ‘ëy‘ë kokoam de a, mma no mfa IATF baguam akwan so.
